description: Open WebUI — self-hosted AI interface supporting Ollama, OpenAI, and other LLM backends.

PORT.description: Port the app listens on. Must be 8080.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Optional: OpenAI API key to connect to OpenAI models.

OLLAMA_BASE_URL.description: Optional: URL of your Ollama instance.

WEBUI_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret key for session signing. Generate a random string.

WEBUI_AUTH.description: Enable login/auth. Set to false for single-user deploys with no login screen.

ENABLE_SIGNUP.description: Allow new users to register. Set to false to lock registration after first user.

DEFAULT_MODELS.description: Comma-separated list of models to pre-select on first load (e.g. gpt-4o,llama3).
